title: fimbristylis tetragona
intro: Fimbristylis tetragona, also known as the bush lily or tufted fimbristylis, is a type of tropical grass that is native to Australia and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of wounds. Fimbristylis tetragona can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
